package rulefixtures

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for ldap_injection_via_string_concat: string concatenation or `fmt.Sprintf` building LDAP filter strings with user input
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario724Positive(db *sql.DB, userInput string) (*sql.Rows, error) {
	query := "select * from users where name = '" + userInput + "'"
	_ = fmt.Sprintf("(&(uid=%s))", userInput)
	return db.Query(query)
}
